title: Career Center Department - About
content:
PURPOSE:

To work on career planning, implementation and development of Üsküdar University students and graduates.

VISION:

It aims to support and inform the graduates who will start their career journey after their university education, to be individuals who have already recognized and defined themselves and the options they will face as much as possible through internships, information meetings and personal development seminars, to clarify their future goals, to be highly aware individuals.

MISSION:

The main functions of the Career Center are student recognition, information, internship, job placement, career monitoring, psychological counseling & guidance services.

Click for Career Center Website.
